data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where settings are copied from one business to another. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads, state checks, or outcomes that confirm this scenario has been executed or validated. The linked use case discusses configurable checklist item types but does not provide concrete evidence of the scenario's execution or its expected results.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or state checks confirming the outcome of the persona scenario.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the outcome of the persona scenario.
